import { Component, OnInit } from '@angular/core'; @Component({ selector: 'app-basic', templateUrl: './basic.component.html', styleUrls: ['./basic.component.scss'] }) /** * Two Step Basic Component */ export class BasicComponent implements OnInit { // set the current year year: number = new Date().getFullYear(); constructor() { } ngOnInit(): void { } /** * Confirm Otp Verification */ config = { allowNumbersOnly: true, length: 4, isPasswordInput: false, disableAutoFocus: false, placeholder: '', inputStyles: { 'width': '80px', 'height': '50px' } }; }
